column1: ----- user de bills que fez pix nos ooutros meses
count (distinct case when o.orderid = su.first_orderid  then o.userid end )as new
count (distinct case when o.orderid > su.first_orderid or o.orderid= su.first_utility_orderid then o.userid end )as new_cross_bils
--count (distinct case when o.orderid > su.first_orderid or o.orderidr =  su.first_utility_orderid then o.userid end )as new_cross_bills
count(distinct case when o.creditcard_amount>0  then o.userid end )as Pgto_CC
inner join stat_users su on su.userid=o.userid
and (o.orderid = su.first_orderid or o.orderid = su.first_pix_out_orderid) ---pix payment
inner join stat_users su on o.orderid = su.first_orderid
